prompt:
Take the FIRST provided reference image PIXEL-FAITHFULLY — same person from chin to torso in a t-shirt, same hand applying the diamond-gem-silhouette Dialed Health heat pack (5-sided cut-gem profile) to the exposed deltoid, same hand pose and finger placement, same arm and shoulder anatomy, same t-shirt outline, same vertical double-headed up-down motion arrow on the skin next to the pack, same composition, same framing, same pure white background, same uniform medium-weight black ink line-art style, same line weight, same minimal short parallel hatching.

THE ONLY MODIFICATION — REDRAW THE DIALED HEALTH LOGO on the front face of the heat pack to match the SECOND provided reference image (the official DH logo). The current logo is wrong (DIALED stacked directly above HEALTH with EKG to the side). The correct layout is OFFSET DIAGONAL:
  - 'DIALED' in bold sans-serif capitals, sitting in the TOP-LEFT area, with its baseline resting ON a horizontal line that runs left-to-right across the logo's width.
  - A HORIZONTAL LINE running fully across the logo, passing under DIALED and over HEALTH. In the MIDDLE of this line there is a single EKG/heartbeat SPIKE — the line briefly dips down into a small V, then sharply peaks up into a tall narrow triangle/spike, then dips back down to a small valley, then resumes as the horizontal line again. One clean heartbeat-style spike, centered on the line between the two words.
  - 'HEALTH' in a LIGHTER-WEIGHT sans-serif capitals (thinner strokes than DIALED, slightly more letter-spaced), sitting in the BOTTOM-RIGHT area, with its top edge touching the underside of the horizontal line.
  - The two words are DIAGONALLY OFFSET — DIALED is left of the EKG spike, HEALTH is right of the EKG spike. They are NOT centered/stacked one directly above the other.
  - Logo sits on the heat pack's front face in clean black ink, scaled proportionally to the visible area of the pack.

Also: the up-down motion arrow next to the pack must be drawn as PLAIN BLACK LINE-ART (matching all other line weights and colors in the image), NOT in red/maroon. Pure black ink only.

Do NOT modify anything else — same person, same hand pose, same heat pack shape (diamond-gem 5-sided silhouette), same t-shirt, same shoulder/deltoid anatomy, same composition, same line weight, same white background, same style. Pure black ink line-art on white, no other color. No frame, no border, no other labels, no numbers.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/Dialed Health_Logo_Updated-02.png
